esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-mysqlreceiver.otel-*
// Threads are gauges; pivot running vs connected by instance
| WHERE metrics.mysql.threads IS NOT NULL
    AND attributes.kind IN ("running", "connected")
| STATS
    running = MAX(metrics.mysql.threads) WHERE attributes.kind == "running",
    connected = MAX(metrics.mysql.threads) WHERE attributes.kind == "connected"
  BY resource.attributes.mysql.instance.endpoint
// Saturation = running threads close to connected (CPU-bound workload)
| EVAL ratio = CASE(connected > 0, running / connected, 0)
// Alert when ratio > 0.9 and we have meaningful thread count; adjust threshold as needed
| WHERE ratio > 0.9 AND connected >= 5
| SORT ratio DESC
